adapter_alias_deprecated.es: alias deprecado: usa "{target}" en lugar de "{alias}"

adapters_none_with_others.es: "none" no se puede combinar con otros adaptadores
adapters_none_with_others.en: "none" cannot be combined with other adapters

action_failed.en: action failed: {error} — rolling back {count} previous actions

branches_to_delete.es: ramas sin seguimiento remoto a eliminar ({count}):

claude_md_separate.es: {c} y {a} son archivos separados con contenido distinto. Para unificar: revisa `diff {c} {a}`, mueve contenido relevante manualmente, luego ejecuta `gitwise setup-agents --replace-claude-with-symlink`.
claude_md_separate.en: {c} and {a} are separate files with different content. To unify: review `diff {c} {a}`, move relevant content manually, then run `gitwise setup-agents --replace-claude-with-symlink`.

claude_md_symlink_other.es: {file} es symlink a '{existing}', no a '{expected}'. Revisa manualmente. Para reemplazar: `gitwise setup-agents --replace-claude-with-symlink`
claude_md_symlink_other.en: {file} is symlink to '{existing}', not '{expected}'. Review manually. To replace: `gitwise setup-agents --replace-claude-with-symlink`

commit_amend_protected.es: no se puede hacer --amend en rama protegida: {branch}

commit_amend_pushed.es: no se puede hacer --amend: {branch} ya fue pusheada (requeriría force-push)

commit_graph_ausente.es: commit-graph ausente — git log puede ser 2-10x más lento
commit_graph_ausente.en: commit-graph missing — git log can be 2-10x slower

commit_graph_cost.es: latencia acumulada en cada sesión de Claude
commit_graph_cost.en: accumulated latency in each Claude session

commit_invalid_format.es: el mensaje no sigue conventional commits: tipo(scope): descripción
commit_invalid_format.en: message does not follow conventional commits: type(scope): description

commit_blocked_in_progress.es: No se puede commitear: hay una operación {state} en curso. Resuélvela o aborta primero.
commit_blocked_in_progress.en: Cannot commit: a {state} operation is in progress. Resolve or abort it first.

commit_no_message.es: usa -m para proveer un mensaje de commit
commit_no_message.en: use -m to provide a commit message

commit_type_invalid.es: tipo inválido: {type}. Válidos: feat, fix, refactor, docs, chore, test, style, perf, ci, build, revert
commit_type_invalid.en: invalid type: {type}. Valid: feat, fix, refactor, docs, chore, test, style, perf, ci, build, revert

missing_dependency_completions_shtab.es: dependencia faltante: shtab (requerida para completions bash/zsh)
missing_dependency_completions_shtab.en: missing dependency: shtab (required for bash/zsh completions)

missing_dependency_hint.es: usa `uv run python -m gitwise ...` o instala deps con `uv sync`
missing_dependency_hint.en: use `uv run python -m gitwise ...` or install dependencies with `uv sync`

config_up_to_date.es: configuración de git ya está actualizada
config_up_to_date.en: git config is already up to date

conflicts_union_failed.es: no se pudo resolver union para {file}

diff_binary_lfs_hint.es: archivo binario {path} ({mib} MiB) -- considera Git LFS
diff_binary_lfs_hint.en: binary file {path} ({mib} MiB) -- consider Git LFS

diff_too_many_refs.es: demasiados argumentos posicionales antes de '--' ({count}); gitwise diff acepta un unico refspec (usa a..b para un rango)
diff_too_many_refs.en: too many positional arguments before '--' ({count}); gitwise diff accepts a single refspec (use a..b for a range)

secret_scan_clean.es: no se detectaron secretos en el diff
secret_scan_clean.en: no secrets detected in the diff

secret_scan_blocked_high.es: commit bloqueado: {count} secreto(s) de alta severidad en el área de staging
secret_scan_blocked_high.en: commit blocked: {count} high-severity secret(s) in the staging area

secret_scan_blocked_hint.es: revoque o rote el secreto, remuévalo del stage, o use --allow-secret (con confirmación) para commitear de todos modos
secret_scan_blocked_hint.en: revoke/rotate the secret, unstage it, or use --allow-secret (with confirmation) to commit anyway

secret_scan_allow_confirm.es: Se detectaron {count} secreto(s) de alta severidad. ¿Commitear de todos modos?

secret_allow_requires_env.es: --allow-secret está bloqueado en modo --json: un agente no puede silenciar la confirmación humana de un secreto sin autorización fuera de banda
secret_allow_requires_env.en: --allow-secret is blocked in --json mode: an agent cannot silence the human confirmation of a secret without out-of-band authorization

secret_allow_requires_env_hint.es: para forzarlo en modo agente, exporte GITWISE_ALLOW_SECRETS=1 (controlado por el operador/CI, no por el prompt)
secret_allow_requires_env_hint.en: to force it in agent mode, export GITWISE_ALLOW_SECRETS=1 (operator/CI-controlled, not prompt-settable)

secret_scan_unavailable.es: no se pudo escanear el área de staging (fail-closed): {error}
secret_scan_unavailable.en: could not scan the staging area (fail-closed): {error}

dry_run_no_clean.es: modo simulación — no se limpiará nada
dry_run_no_clean.en: dry-run mode — nothing will be cleaned

dry_run_no_delete.es: modo simulación — no se eliminará nada
dry_run_no_delete.en: dry-run mode — nothing will be deleted

dry_run_no_exec.es: modo simulación — no se ejecutará nada
dry_run_no_exec.en: dry-run mode — nothing will be executed

dry_run_nothing.es: modo simulación — no se escribirá nada:
dry_run_nothing.en: dry-run mode — nothing will be written:

fsmonitor_cost.es: ~50ms extra por git status en repos medianos
fsmonitor_cost.en: ~50ms extra per git status in medium repos

fsmonitor_disabled.es: core.fsmonitor desactivado — git status más lento en repos grandes
fsmonitor_disabled.en: core.fsmonitor disabled — slower git status in large repos

fsmonitor_not_supported.es: fsmonitor integrado no está soportado en Linux (solo macOS y Windows)
fsmonitor_not_supported.en: built-in fsmonitor not supported on Linux (macOS and Windows only)

setup_agents_windows_global_unsupported.es: setup-agents en modo global no está soportado en Windows (requiere symlinks POSIX en ~/.claude/).
setup_agents_windows_global_unsupported.en: setup-agents global mode is not supported on Windows (requires POSIX symlinks in ~/.claude/).

setup_agents_windows_workaround_local.es: Workaround: usá 'gitwise setup-agents --local --no-symlinks' dentro del repo donde quieras configurar los agentes.
setup_agents_windows_workaround_local.en: Workaround: use 'gitwise setup-agents --local --no-symlinks' inside the repo where you want to set up agents.

setup_agents_windows_auto_no_symlinks.es: Windows detectado: activando --no-symlinks automáticamente (los symlinks POSIX no son confiables en Windows).
setup_agents_windows_auto_no_symlinks.en: Windows detected: auto-enabling --no-symlinks (POSIX symlinks are not reliable on Windows).

gc_already_running.es: git gc/maintenance ya está en ejecución — esperá a que termine
gc_already_running.en: git gc/maintenance already running — wait for it to finish

gitattributes_conflict.es: .gitattributes: '{pattern}' tiene regla existente '{existing}' que puede entrar en conflicto con la de gitwise '{desired}'. Elimina la línea fuera del bloque managed para evitar duplicados.
gitattributes_conflict.en: .gitattributes: '{pattern}' has existing rule '{existing}' that may conflict with gitwise's '{desired}'. Remove the line outside the managed block to avoid duplicates.

gitattributes_force_lf.es: # Convention files: force LF for cross-platform consistency
gitattributes_force_lf.en: # Convention files: force LF for cross-platform consistency

gitattributes_merge_ours.es: # Generated snapshot: use local version on merge
gitattributes_merge_ours.en: # Generated snapshot: use local version on merge

gitignore_claude_local.es: # Claude Code local/personal files (do not commit)
gitignore_claude_local.en: # Claude Code local/personal files (do not commit)

gitignore_snapshot.es: # Snapshot regenerated each gitwise run (timestamps change)
gitignore_snapshot.en: # Snapshot regenerated each gitwise run (timestamps change)

global_skill_symlink_broken.es: ~/.claude/skills/{skill} es un symlink roto — arréglalo manualmente
global_skill_symlink_broken.en: ~/.claude/skills/{skill} is a broken symlink — fix it manually

global_skill_symlink_different.es: ~/.claude/skills/{skill} es symlink a '{existing}', no a '{expected}' — se mantiene como está
global_skill_symlink_different.en: ~/.claude/skills/{skill} is symlink to '{existing}', not '{expected}' — keeping as is

gpg_active_no_key_repo.es: GPG signing activo pero sin user.signingkey — ejecuta: git config user.signingkey <id>
gpg_active_no_key_repo.en: GPG signing active but no user.signingkey — run: git config user.signingkey <id>

gpg_binary_missing_audit.es: commit.gpgsign=true pero gpg no instalado — los commits fallarán
gpg_binary_missing_audit.en: commit.gpgsign=true but gpg not installed — commits will fail

gpg_binary_missing_cost.es: ningún git commit funcionará hasta instalarlo
gpg_binary_missing_cost.en: no git commit will work until installed

gpg_not_configured_audit.es: GPG no configurado — commits sin firma digital

gpg_not_configured_fix.es: brew install gnupg  →  git config --global commit.gpgsign true
gpg_not_configured_fix.en: brew install gnupg  →  git config --global commit.gpgsign true

gpg_not_enabled.es: gpg instalado pero commit.gpgsign no activado
gpg_not_enabled.en: gpg installed but commit.gpgsign not enabled

gpg_not_installed.es: gpg no instalado — commits no se firmarán
gpg_not_installed.en: gpg not installed — commits won't be signed

gpg_not_installed_commit.es: GPG no instalado — no se pueden firmar commits
gpg_not_installed_commit.en: GPG not installed — cannot sign commits

gpg_ready_msg.es: GPG listo — commit.gpgsign=true, llave y binario configurados
gpg_ready_msg.en: GPG ready — commit.gpgsign=true, key and binary configured

gpg_signing_active_global.es: GPG signing activo pero sin user.signingkey — ejecuta: git config user.signingkey <id>
gpg_signing_active_global.en: GPG signing active but no user.signingkey — run: git config user.signingkey <id>

gpg_signing_active_no_key.es: GPG signing activo pero sin user.signingkey — ejecuta: git config user.signingkey <id>
gpg_signing_active_no_key.en: GPG signing active but no user.signingkey — run: git config user.signingkey <id>

gpg_signing_not_configured.es: GPG signing no configurado — si lo deseas: git config commit.gpgsign true
gpg_signing_not_configured.en: GPG signing not configured — if desired: git config commit.gpgsign true

help_root_environment_epilog.es:
Entorno:
  GITWISE_DEBUG=1          imprime logs debug de subprocess git
  GITWISE_LOG_JSON=1       logs estructurados en stderr (JSON lines)
  GITWISE_JSON_PRETTY=1    activa JSON con formato por defecto
  GITWISE_LANG=es|en       fuerza el locale de salida
  GITWISE_THEME=dark|light|auto override de tema de color
  GITWISE_NO_COLOR=1       desactiva salida ANSI color
  GITWISE_OUTPUT=agent     modo de salida orientado a máquina
  GITWISE_AGENT=1          alias para forzar modo agent
  GITWISE_GIT_TIMEOUT=<s>  timeout de subprocess git en segundos
  GITWISE_WIDTH=<cols>     override del ancho de salida
  GITWISE_BIN_DIR=<path>   destino de instalación para install.sh
help_root_environment_epilog.en:
Environment:
  GITWISE_DEBUG=1          print git subprocess debug logs
  GITWISE_LOG_JSON=1       structured stderr logs (JSON lines)
  GITWISE_JSON_PRETTY=1    pretty-print JSON output by default
  GITWISE_LANG=es|en       force output locale
  GITWISE_THEME=dark|light|auto color theme override
  GITWISE_NO_COLOR=1       disable ANSI color output
  GITWISE_OUTPUT=agent     machine-oriented output mode
  GITWISE_AGENT=1          alias to force agent output mode
  GITWISE_GIT_TIMEOUT=<s>  git subprocess timeout in seconds
  GITWISE_WIDTH=<cols>     override output width
  GITWISE_BIN_DIR=<path>   install destination for install.sh

invalid_json.es: .claude/settings.json existente tiene JSON inválido — se sobreescribirá
invalid_json.en: existing .claude/settings.json has invalid JSON — will be overwritten

large_blobs_fix.es: considerar git-lfs o eliminación de la historia

legacy_commands.es: .claude/commands/{skill}.md es formato antiguo — ahora se usa .claude/skills/{skill}/SKILL.md. Eliminá el .md viejo manualmente.
legacy_commands.en: .claude/commands/{skill}.md is legacy format — now using .claude/skills/{skill}/SKILL.md. Delete the old .md manually.

legacy_migration_mode.es: modo migracion legacy activo: se prioriza layout canonico (AGENTS.md + .agents/skills)
legacy_migration_mode.en: legacy migration mode enabled: canonical layout (AGENTS.md + .agents/skills) is enforced

managed_block_unclosed.es: {file}: bloque managed sin marcador de cierre — se dejará intacto
managed_block_unclosed.en: {file}: managed block missing closing marker — will be left intact

merge_detached_head.es: HEAD desacoplado, no se puede mezclar

merge_branch_required.es: Especifica la rama a mezclar, o usa --abort/--continue para una operación pausada
merge_branch_required.en: Specify a branch to merge, or use --abort/--continue for a paused operation

merge_no_in_progress.es: No hay mezcla/rebase en curso (estado actual: {state}). Usa {action} solo cuando gitwise detecta operación pausada.
merge_no_in_progress.en: No merge/rebase in progress (current state: {state}). Use {action} only when gitwise detects a paused operation.

merge_hint.es: Revisa conflictos o usa --dry-run para ver advertencias antes de ejecutar.
merge_hint.en: Review conflicts or use --dry-run to inspect warnings before running.

merge_same_branch.es: No se puede mezclar una branch consigo misma
merge_same_branch.en: Cannot merge a branch into itself

schema_unknown_command_hint.es: ejecuta `gitwise commands --json` para listar comandos disponibles
schema_unknown_command_hint.en: run `gitwise commands --json` to list available commands

schema_file_missing.es: schema no encontrado para comando '{command}' en versión {version}
schema_file_missing.en: schema not found for command '{command}' in version {version}

missing_globs_frontmatter.es: .claude/rules/{name}: falta 'globs:' en frontmatter — la regla no se activará
missing_globs_frontmatter.en: .claude/rules/{name}: missing 'globs:' in frontmatter — rule won't activate

mixed_staging.es: hay archivos en área de preparación y sin confirmar — el commit no sería atómico
mixed_staging.en: staged and unstaged files present — commit wouldn't be atomic

mixed_staging_cost.es: commits no atómicos dificultan el historial
mixed_staging_cost.en: non-atomic commits make history harder to follow

mixed_staging_fix.es: revisar con git diff --staged antes de confirmar
mixed_staging_fix.en: review with git diff --staged before committing

no_repo_root.es: no se pudo determinar la raíz del repositorio

no_stale_branches.es: no hay ramas sin seguimiento remoto ([gone])

pr_gh_required.es: gh CLI no encontrado — instala: brew install gh
pr_gh_required.en: gh CLI not found — install: brew install gh

pr_comments_none.es: no hay comentarios en este PR

pr_checks_none.es: no hay checks para este PR

pr_create_needs_title.es: pr create requiere --title (o --fill para usar el commit)
pr_create_needs_title.en: pr create requires --title (or --fill to use the commit message)

pr_create_failed.es: no se pudo crear el pull request

pr_unknown_action.es: acción desconocida: {action}. Usa: list, checks, view, comments
pr_unknown_action.en: unknown action: {action}. Use: list, checks, view, comments

protected_stale_branches.es: ramas sin seguimiento remoto protegidas ({count}) — no se tocarán:
protected_stale_branches.en: protected stale branches ({count}) — won't be touched:

settings_sin_gpg_deny.es: settings.json no tiene reglas deny para GPG bypass — revisar manualmente
settings_sin_gpg_deny.en: settings.json missing deny rules for GPG bypass — check manually

setup_hook_warning_legacy_conflict.es: core.hooksPath apunta a '{current}'. Con modo preserve se omiten hooks para no romper configuración existente.
setup_hook_warning_legacy_conflict.en: core.hooksPath points to '{current}'. In preserve mode, hooks are skipped to avoid breaking existing setup.

setup_hook_warning_legacy_overwrite.en: legacy mode will overwrite current core.hooksPath: '{current}'

setup_hook_warning_managers_no_native.es: detectados {managers} y Git sin hooks nativos: se omite instalación de hooks para evitar conflictos.
setup_hook_warning_managers_no_native.en: detected {managers} and native config hooks unavailable: skipping hook installation to avoid conflicts.

setup_hook_warning_managers_preserve.es: detectados {managers}. Con modo preserve se omite instalación de hooks para evitar conflictos.
setup_hook_warning_managers_preserve.en: detected {managers}. In preserve mode, hook installation is skipped to avoid conflicts.

setup_hook_warning_existing_scripts.es: hooks ya existentes detectados ({hooks}) en el directorio activo. Con modo preserve se omite instalación de hooks para evitar sobreescritura.
setup_hook_warning_existing_scripts.en: existing hooks detected ({hooks}) in the active hooks directory. In preserve mode, hook installation is skipped to avoid overwriting.

setup_hook_warning_native_unsupported.es: modo native requiere soporte de hooks por configuración de Git (git hook + hook.<name>.*). Se omite instalación de hooks.
setup_hook_warning_native_unsupported.en: native mode requires Git config hooks support (git hook + hook.<name>.*). Hook installation is skipped.

setup_note_hooks_legacy.es: instala hooks Gitwise vía core.hooksPath (modo legacy)
setup_note_hooks_legacy.en: installs Gitwise hooks via core.hooksPath (legacy mode)

setup_note_hooks_native.es: instala hook nativo por configuración Git (modo native)
setup_note_hooks_native.en: installs native hook via Git config (native mode)

setup_note_hooks_native_event.es: agrega evento del hook nativo en Git config
setup_note_hooks_native_event.en: adds native hook event in Git config

setup_note_hooks_native_migrate.es: migra desde core.hooksPath de Gitwise a hooks nativos
setup_note_hooks_native_migrate.en: migrates from Gitwise core.hooksPath to native hooks

skill_conflict_dir_agents.es: ~/.claude/skills/{skill} es dir regular y ~/.agents/skills/{skill} también existe — sin cambios. Consolida manualmente.
skill_conflict_dir_agents.en: ~/.claude/skills/{skill} is a regular dir and ~/.agents/skills/{skill} also exists — no changes. Consolidate manually.

skill_dir_regular_with_agents.es: .claude/skills/{skill} es un directorio regular aunque .agents/ existe — gitwise escribe SKILL.md directamente
skill_dir_regular_with_agents.en: .claude/skills/{skill} is a regular directory even though .agents/ exists — gitwise writes SKILL.md directly

skill_globally_available.es: .claude/skills/{skill}: skill ya disponible globalmente (~/.claude/skills/) — se omite creación local (prioridad user > project)
skill_globally_available.en: .claude/skills/{skill}: skill already available globally (~/.claude/skills/) — skipping local creation (user > project priority)

skill_symlink_broken.es: .claude/skills/{skill} es un symlink roto — arréglalo manualmente
skill_symlink_broken.en: .claude/skills/{skill} is a broken symlink — fix it manually

skill_symlink_different.es: .claude/skills/{skill} es symlink a '{existing}', no a '{expected}' — se mantiene como está
skill_symlink_different.en: .claude/skills/{skill} is symlink to '{existing}', not '{expected}' — keeping as is

stale_branches_cost.es: clutter en `git branch`; confunde agentes Claude
stale_branches_cost.en: clutter in `git branch`; confuses Claude agents

stash_fix.es: git stash drop stash@{N}  o  git stash clear
stash_fix.en: git stash drop stash@{N}  or  git stash clear

stash_pushed.es: Cambios guardados en un nuevo stash
stash_pushed.en: Changes saved to a new stash

stash_push_failed.es: No se pudo crear el stash (¿no hay cambios?)

stash_clear_failed.es: No se pudieron limpiar los stashes

stash_hint.es: Usa 'gitwise stash list' para ver índices válidos antes de show/drop/pop.
stash_hint.en: Use 'gitwise stash list' to inspect valid indexes before show/drop/pop.

suggest_diff_failed.es: No se pudo obtener diff staged

suggest_blocked_in_progress.es: No se puede sugerir commit: hay una operación {state} en curso. Resuélvela o aborta primero.
suggest_blocked_in_progress.en: Cannot suggest commit: a {state} operation is in progress. Resolve or abort it first.

suggest_no_staged.es: No hay archivos en área de preparación

symlink_conflict_broken.es: {file} es un symlink roto — arréglalo manualmente
symlink_conflict_broken.en: {file} is a broken symlink — fix it manually

symlink_conflict_file.es: {file} es un archivo regular — no se sobreescribirá automáticamente
symlink_conflict_file.en: {file} is a regular file — won't be overwritten automatically

symlink_conflict_regular.es: {file} ya es symlink a '{existing}', se esperaba '{expected}'
symlink_conflict_regular.en: {file} is already a symlink to '{existing}', expected '{expected}'

symlink_escapes_root.es: Symlink target escapa del root del repositorio: {target}

sync_pull_diverged.es: pull falló: el branch local y el remoto han divergido (gitwise sync usa --ff-only por seguridad)
sync_pull_diverged.en: pull failed: local and remote have diverged (gitwise sync uses --ff-only for safety)

sync_pull_failed.es: pull falló (¿sin upstream, error de red o árbol sucio?)
sync_pull_failed.en: pull failed (no upstream, network error, or dirty tree?)

sync_pull_diverged_hint.es: Inspecciona el estado con: gitwise sync --dry-run --json. Reconcilia con: git pull --rebase (recomendado) o git pull --no-rebase. Luego: gitwise sync --push.
sync_pull_diverged_hint.en: Inspect state with: gitwise sync --dry-run --json. Reconcile with: git pull --rebase (recommended) or git pull --no-rebase. Then: gitwise sync --push.

yes_required_with_json.es: --json en un comando con efectos requiere --yes explícito (no se puede confirmar de forma interactiva)
yes_required_with_json.en: --json on a side-effecting command requires explicit --yes (cannot confirm interactively)

yes_required_hint.es: Vuelve a ejecutar con --yes o usa --dry-run para inspeccionar el plan sin efectos.
yes_required_hint.en: Re-run with --yes, or use --dry-run to inspect the plan without side effects.

optimize_partial_failure.es: optimize completó con fallos en uno o más pasos
optimize_partial_failure.en: optimize completed with one or more failed steps

setup_partial_failure.es: setup completó con fallos en uno o más keys
setup_partial_failure.en: setup completed with one or more failed keys

sync_hint.es: Verifica remote/upstream y prueba con --dry-run antes de reintentar.
sync_hint.en: Check remote/upstream and try --dry-run before retrying.

sync_push_protected_hint.es: Haz push desde una branch de feature y abre PR hacia la rama protegida.
sync_push_protected_hint.en: Push from a feature branch and open a PR into the protected branch.

sync_push_protected.es: no se puede hacer push a rama protegida: {branch}

tip_staged.es: sin cambios sin confirmar  (tip: --staged para archivos en staging)
tip_staged.en: no uncommitted changes  (tip: --staged for staged files)

tool_bat_desc.es: visualización de archivos con syntax highlighting

tool_git_sizer_desc.es: análisis de tamaño e historia del repo

tool_watchman_desc.en: native fsmonitor — speeds up git status

undo_confirm_hard.es: ¿reset --hard a {ref}? Esto descartará cambios sin commit [s/N]
undo_confirm_hard.en: reset --hard to {ref}? This will discard uncommitted changes [y/N]

undo_no_entries.es: no hay entradas en el reflog

undo_not_enough_history.es: no hay suficiente historial para retroceder {steps} pasos
undo_not_enough_history.en: not enough history to go back {steps} steps

undo_reflog_failed.es: no se pudo leer el reflog

worktree_not_found.es: no se encontro un worktree para: {target}

worktree_remove_primary.es: no se puede eliminar el worktree principal

worktree_usage_full.es: uso: gitwise worktree new <branch>  |  gitwise worktree clean [--dry-run]
worktree_usage_full.en: usage: gitwise worktree new <branch>  |  gitwise worktree clean [--dry-run]

update_requires_git_clone.es: update requiere una instalación vía git clone (no se encontró .git/)
update_requires_git_clone.en: update requires a git clone installation (.git/ not found)

update_no_upstream.es: la rama actual '{branch}' no tiene rama de seguimiento; update solo puede actualizar una rama con upstream
update_no_upstream.en: current branch '{branch}' has no upstream; update can only fast-forward a tracking branch

update_no_upstream_hint.es: cambia a tu rama principal (p.ej. 'git switch main') o configura el upstream con 'git branch --set-upstream-to=origin/{branch}'
update_no_upstream_hint.en: switch to your main branch (e.g. 'git switch main') or set an upstream with 'git branch --set-upstream-to=origin/{branch}'

invalid_grep_pattern.es: patrón de búsqueda inválido o peligroso: {pattern}

invalid_author_pattern.es: patrón de author inválido o peligroso: {pattern}

unexpected_error.es: error inesperado. Ejecuta con GITWISE_DEBUG=1 para más detalles.
unexpected_error.en: unexpected error. Run with GITWISE_DEBUG=1 for details.

invalid_sort_field.es: campo de ordenamiento no válido: {field}. Campos válidos: refname, committerdate, creatordate, authordate
invalid_sort_field.en: invalid sort field: {field}. Valid fields: refname, committerdate, creatordate, authordate
